other_observers: Glenn Walbek, Joe Roller, Mark Peterson, Cole Wild, Cade Cropper, John Breitsch, Joyce Takamine, Sandy Arnesen, Bill Maynard; Steve Mlodinow found/identified this bird on 10/08/2012. I was the first to locate this bird on 10/09/2012.
specific_location: NE corner of US36/CO71 near old motel in Last Chance
description: Warbler shaped bird, warbler bill. Smaller than a YRWA. Round yellow face, dirty-white throat, chest, belly, vent. Crown slaty-gray-green which extends down through the mantle. Lower back and tail dark slaty-gray with two prominent white wing-bars. No streaking on sides.Behaviors: Nothing notable. Acted like a warbler. Quiet.Call: NonePlumage: Juv.
